title: Humanity Protocol’s $36M hack tied to suspected North Korean hackers: Quantstamp
summary: A fake Bithumb email used in the $36 million Humanity Protocol hack points to the involvement of North Korean threat actors, according to Quantstamp.

summary: Bitcoin stayed near local highs on a new US-Iran peace deal pledge as analysis saw conditions favoring a sustained BTC price rebound.

title: Switzerland Narrowly Rejects Proposal to Cap Population at 10 Million
summary: Switzerland recently held a referendum on a proposal to limit the country's population to 10 million, which was narrowly rejected by voters with a 55 to 45 percent margin.
